Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class OpportunityFieldHistory

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.OpportunityFieldHistory
public class OpportunityFieldHistory extends SObject

Java class for OpportunityFieldHistory complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="OpportunityFieldHistory">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DataType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Field" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NewValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OldValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Opportunity" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Opportunity" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OpportunityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
